sqlMap.insert:
insert into settlementlog (id, appId, product, card, accountType, bankName, bankNetName, accountName, accountCounter, account, faitAmount, uAmount, proof, status, createTime, finishTime, rate, operator, comment) values (null, #appId#,#product#,#card#,#accountType#,#bankName#,#bankNetName#,#accountName#, #accountCounter# , #account#, #faitAmount#, 0, '', 0, now(), null, 0, 0, #comment#)
select LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
sqlMap.select: select count(1) from settlementlog where account = #account#

select id, appId, faitAmount, uAmount,account, proof, status, createTime, finishTime, rate from settlementlog where 1=1
appId = #appId#
status = #status#
createTime >= #startCreateTime#
createTime <= #endCreateTime#
finishTime >= #startFinishTime#
finishTime <= #endFinishTime#
order by CreateTime desc
limit $rowIndex$,$limit$

select count(if(status = 0,id,null)) as processedNum, sum(if(status = 0,faitAmount,0)) as processedFiatAmount, count(id) as totalAllNum, sum(faitAmount) as totalFailAmount, sum(uAmount) as totalUAmount from settlementlog where 1=1
appId = #appId#
status = #status#
createTime >= #startCreateTime#
createTime <= #endCreateTime#
finishTime >= #startFinishTime#
finishTime <= #endFinishTime#
